---
title: "TidyTuesday: {{week_title}}"
description: "{{description}}"
date: "{{date}}"
x-posted: false
author: "chokotto"
categories:
  - TidyTuesday
  - R
  - Finance
# Web 一覧には SVG を使用（ブラウザで表示可能）
image: "thumbnail.svg"
engine: knitr
# SNS (X) カード画像は SVG 非対応のため PNG を指定（CI で thumbnail.svg → thumbnail.png に変換）
twitter-card:
  card-type: summary_large_image
  image: "thumbnail.png"
code-fold: true
---

<!-- dataviz-lessons チェック: tasks/dataviz-lessons.md を確認し過去の教訓を適用すること -->

## Overview

{{overview}}

## Dataset

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(glue)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| message: false

# Load this week's data
# tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('{{date}}')
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-theme
#| message: false

# Source/Note caption (Note | Source | copyright)
SOURCE_CAPTION <- "Note: {{note}}  |  Source: {{source}}  |  \u00A9 2026 chokotto"

# Base theme (customize per post as needed)
theme_tt <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray50", size = 10),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      face = "italic", color = "#64748b", size = 9,
      hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 12)
    ),
    plot.caption.position = "plot",
    plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15)
  )
```

## Exploratory Analysis

{{analysis}}

## Visualization

```{r}
#| label: main-viz
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 7
#| warning: false

# Main visualization code here
# Individual charts: p1, p2, ... (caption is on combined panel only)

# Combined panel with Source/Note caption
# combined <- p1 / p2 +
#   plot_annotation(
#     title = "{{combined_title}}",
#     subtitle = "{{combined_subtitle}}",
#     caption = SOURCE_CAPTION,
#     theme = theme_tt
#   )
# combined
```

## Key Findings

{{findings}}

***

_This post is part of the [TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) weekly data visualization project._

:::{.callout-caution collapse="false" appearance="minimal" icon="false"}
## Disclaimer

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.6;"}
This analysis is for educational and practice purposes only. Data visualizations and interpretations are based on the provided dataset and may not represent complete or current information.
:::
:::
